button.name: button
button.description: Primary action element with primary / ghost / outline variants.

kbd.name: kbd
kbd.description: Keyboard shortcut hint, styled like a key cap.

input.name: input
input.description: Base text input primitive with leading/trailing slots.

search-input.name: search-input
search-input.description: Pill search field with magnifier + ⌘K hint + clear button.

textarea.name: textarea
textarea.description: Multi-line text input with optional auto-resize.

nav-item.name: nav-item
nav-item.description: Sidebar navigation row with dot / label / aside slots.

segmented-control.name: segmented-control
segmented-control.description: Connected radio buttons sharing one rounded chassis.

tabs.name: tabs
tabs.description: Pill-style tab strip (vertical / horizontal) with optional counts.

chip.name: chip
chip.description: Toggleable filter pill with optional count.

status-row.name: status-row
status-row.description: Compact summary card for an in-progress operation.

separator.name: separator
separator.description: Horizontal or vertical rule, solid or dashed.

stack.name: stack
stack.description: Vertical flex column with token-driven gap, align, and justify.

container.name: container
container.description: Max-width content well with auto margins (sm / md / lg / xl / full).

spacer.name: spacer
spacer.description: Flex helper that fills remaining space between siblings.

center.name: center
center.description: Flex container that centers its children on both axes.

box.name: box
box.description: Generic div wrapper with token-driven padding and radius shortcuts.

section.name: section
section.description: Semantic <section> with optional display-font title and muted subtitle.

aspect-ratio.name: aspect-ratio
aspect-ratio.description: Locks a child block to a fixed width:height ratio.

skeleton.name: skeleton
skeleton.description: Pulsing placeholder block for loading states (rect / text / circle).

hstack.name: hstack
hstack.description: Horizontal flex row with token-driven gap, align, justify, and optional wrap.

vstack.name: vstack
vstack.description: Vertical flex column. Naming-symmetric twin of HStack.

flex.name: flex
flex.description: Generic flex container with explicit direction, wrap, gap, align, and justify.

field.name: field
field.description: Labeled form-field wrapper with auto-id, description, error, and ARIA wiring.

empty.name: empty
empty.description: Empty-state placeholder with optional icon, title, description, and action.

avatar.name: avatar
avatar.description: Circular user image with initials fallback (xs / sm / md / lg / xl).

scroll-area.name: scroll-area
scroll-area.description: Overflow container with native-feel styled scrollbars (vertical / horizontal / both).

typography.name: typography
typography.description: Preset typographic styles (display / h1-h4 / lead / body / caption / eyebrow) with tone overrides.

notch.name: notch
notch.description: Frosted-material section header with leading / trailing slots (macOS-flavored).

toggle.name: toggle
toggle.description: Pressable button with persistent on/off state (default / outline variants).

toggle-group.name: toggle-group
toggle-group.description: Set of related Toggles with single or multiple selection mode.

switch.name: switch
switch.description: Sliding on/off control (the macOS-Settings shape) with sm / md sizes.

checkbox.name: checkbox
checkbox.description: Boolean form control with optional label and indeterminate state.

radio-group.name: radio-group
radio-group.description: Single-select group of radio options (vertical / horizontal).

slider.name: slider
slider.description: Single-thumb range input with token-driven track and thumb chrome.

number-input.name: number-input
number-input.description: Numeric text field with ▲▼ Stepper, min / max / step support.

pin-input.name: pin-input
pin-input.description: Fixed-length OTP / verification code field with paste, auto-advance, and masking.

password-input.name: password-input
password-input.description: Input with a show / hide toggle eye icon in the trailing slot.

dialog.name: dialog
dialog.description: Modal overlay built on bits-ui (focus trap, ESC, portal). Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

alert-dialog.name: alert-dialog
alert-dialog.description: Confirmation modal (alertdialog role) for destructive actions. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

popover.name: popover
popover.description: Anchored floating panel with bits-ui positioning. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

tooltip.name: tooltip
tooltip.description: Hover- / focus-triggered short label built on bits-ui. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

sheet.name: sheet
sheet.description: Slide-in panel from a screen edge (right / left / top / bottom). Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

drawer.name: drawer
drawer.description: Bottom-anchored slide-up sheet with a drag handle. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

toast.name: toast
toast.description: Sonner-style toast queue. Mount <Toaster /> once and call toast() imperatively.

dropdown-menu.name: dropdown-menu
dropdown-menu.description: Pop-up menu of actions built on bits-ui's DropdownMenu (items-based API). Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

context-menu.name: context-menu
context-menu.description: Right-click pop-up menu built on bits-ui's ContextMenu. Reuses DropdownMenu chrome. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

command.name: command
command.description: Searchable ⌘K palette — filterable list with keyboard nav. Pure Svelte, no headless dep.

select.name: select
select.description: Dropdown picker built on bits-ui's Select. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

native-select.name: native-select
native-select.description: System <select> with our chrome. No headless dep — useful for SSR forms or mobile-native pickers.

combobox.name: combobox
combobox.description: Typeahead select built on bits-ui's Combobox — filter as you type. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

breadcrumb.name: breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: Hierarchical navigation trail with separator + current-page handling.

drag-handle.name: drag-handle
drag-handle.description: Grip-dot indicator for resize / reorder targets (vertical or horizontal).

traffic-lights.name: traffic-lights
traffic-lights.description: macOS window controls (close / minimise / zoom). Wire to your window manager.

progress-ring.name: progress-ring
progress-ring.description: Circular determinate progress (sm / md / lg / xl) with optional centered label.

meter.name: meter
meter.description: Discrete level indicator (battery / signal / score) with default + semantic tones.

sparkline.name: sparkline
sparkline.description: Inline mini line chart from a values array, with optional area fill.

sidebar.name: sidebar
sidebar.description: Collapsible side panel with header / body / footer slots.

toolbar.name: toolbar
toolbar.description: Horizontal action strip with macOS-flavored chrome and density options.

page-header.name: page-header
page-header.description: Page-level header with title / eyebrow / description and optional sticky.

page-body.name: page-body
page-body.description: Page-level main content region; pairs with PageHeader and PageFooter.

page-footer.name: page-footer
page-footer.description: Page-level footer with bordered top and muted small text.

app-shell.name: app-shell
app-shell.description: Full-window header / sidebar / main / footer scaffold (compose-style with slots).

collapsible.name: collapsible
collapsible.description: Toggle-visibility container built on bits-ui's Collapsible. Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

accordion.name: accordion
accordion.description: Vertical stack of collapsible items (single / multiple). Requires `npm install bits-ui`.

inspector.name: inspector
inspector.description: macOS-flavored right-side property panel with sections of label/value rows.

resizable.name: resizable
resizable.description: Two-pane container with a draggable handle between them (pointer-based, no library dep).

split-view.name: split-view
split-view.description: Multi-pane container with hairline dividers (macOS-flavored). For 2-pane reach for Resizable.

title-bar.name: title-bar
title-bar.description: macOS-style window title bar with drag region + leading / trailing slots.

source-list.name: source-list
source-list.description: macOS Finder-style sidebar list with icons, labels, and counts.

outline-view.name: outline-view
outline-view.description: Disclosure tree (TreeView) with chevron toggles and selection state.

table.name: table
table.description: Data-driven HTML table with sticky header, striped rows, and client-side sorting.

list.name: list
list.description: Vertical row list with label / description and optional click handlers.

virtual-list.name: virtual-list
virtual-list.description: Windowed list for large datasets (fixed item height, no library dep).

infinite-scroll.name: infinite-scroll
infinite-scroll.description: IntersectionObserver-based load-more sentinel. Wraps any scrollable list.

timeline.name: timeline
timeline.description: Vertical chronological event list with markers and tones.

calendar.name: calendar
calendar.description: Month-grid date picker built on bits-ui. Requires `npm install bits-ui @internationalized/date`.
